title: Invalid attribute case created for rootfS (uppercase trailing S) for windows-based image.

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

That’s because the original image has the same problem: compare `skopeo inspect --raw --override-os=windows --config  --insecure-policy docker://mcr.microsoft.com/windows/nanoserver:20H2 `.

Go’s implementation happens to look up JSON keys also ignoring case <s>(and a copy like that might not need to even inspect the field)</s>, so Skopeo didn’t notice.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@mtrmac Thanks... so let me close this as this is an upstream issue
